test.command: cd backend && source venv/bin/activate && python -m pytest tests/ -v --tb=short
test.details: All backend tests passing including test_inference_streaming.py (13 tests) and test_thinking_events.py (8 tests)

typecheck.details: TypeScript compilation successful, no type errors

lint.command: cd frontend && npm run lint (next lint)

appliedUpdates.description: Added respx==0.20.2 for HTTP mocking in tests
Added mock fixtures for realtime event bus and inference service

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document the MockAsyncIterator pattern for testing async generators with httpx streaming in backend tests
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: test_inference_streaming.py uses a MockAsyncIterator helper class for mocking httpx streaming responses. This pattern is essential for testing async generators but not documented.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add note about direct Zustand store manipulation pattern when immediate state updates are needed (e.g., timer storage for cancellation)
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: frontend-thinking-fixes uses useChatStore.setState() directly in socketService.ts to store timer references immediately when thinking_end fires, bypassing normal action flow

rejectedObservations.note: The frontend-thinking-fixes reviewer flagged this as a non-blocking issue. It's minor cleanup that can be addressed in a future refactor.
